# taikun_robot (Resource)

Taikun Robot User



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Account ID the robot user belongs to.
- `description` (String) Robot user's description.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiration date in RFC3339 format.
- `name` (String) Robot user's name.

### Optional

- `ips` (List of String) List of allowed IP addresses.
- `organization_id` (Number) Organization ID for the robot user.
- `regenerate_trigger` (String) Change this value to trigger credential regeneration.
- `scopes` (List of String) List of scopes assigned to the robot user.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) Robot user's access key.
- `created_at` (String) Time and date of creation.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the robot user is active.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Robot user's secret key. Only available at creation or after regeneration.
- `user_id` (String) Robot user's UUID.
